mapper.insert: INSERT INTO museum ( _id, MUSEUM_ID, MUSEUM_TITLE, ADMIN_ID, MUSEUM_OBJ, MUSEUM_PIC, MUSEUM_MAX_JOIN_CNT, MUSEUM_BOOK_SET, MUSEUM_STATUS, MUSEUM_ADD_TIME, MUSEUM_EDIT_TIME, _pid, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, ADDRESS ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{museumId}, #{museumTitle}, #{adminId}, #{museumObj}, #{museumPic}, #{museumMaxJoinCnt}, #{museumBookSet}, #{museumStatus}, #{museumAddTime}, #{museumEditTime}, #{pid}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{address} )
mapper.update: UPDATE museum SET MUSEUM_ID = #{museumId}, MUSEUM_TITLE = #{museumTitle}, ADMIN_ID = #{adminId}, MUSEUM_OBJ = #{museumObj}, MUSEUM_PIC = #{museumPic}, MUSEUM_MAX_JOIN_CNT = #{museumMaxJoinCnt}, MUSEUM_BOOK_SET = #{museumBookSet}, MUSEUM_STATUS = #{museumStatus}, MUSEUM_ADD_TIME = #{museumAddTime}, MUSEUM_EDIT_TIME = #{museumEditTime}, _pid = #{pid}, LATITUDE = #{latitude}, LONGITUDE = #{longitude}, ADDRESS = #{address} WHERE _id = #{id}
